Description:
Ballistic of the 120x570mm M829 APFSDS fired from tank gun M256 in the US.

This entry may be manipulated to yield the ballistics of the following rounds.

Caliber  Travel
         (mm)
L44      4750
L55      6050

Projectile  Mass  Charge        Mass           Pressure  Velocity      Remark
            (kg)                (kg)           (breech)  (m/s)  (ft/s)  
-- United States of America Service Rounds (DU) --
M829        7.1   JA-2 19 perf  8.14 (0.8) kg  510 MPa   1679   5510   Charge wt. follows TM-43-0001-28-1994
M829A1      9.0   JA-2 19 perf  8.7  (0.8) kg  560 MPa   1570   5150   Charge wt. follows TM-43-0001-28-1994
                                                   model:1590
M829A2      7.9   JA-2 19-perf  8.7  (0.8) kg  580 MPa   1680   5512   per GD-OTS product brochure

Gun parameters from ADA 18175 "A Propulsion System Comparison Study for the 120-mm Anti-Armor Cannon" (1987). Increased resistance factor to match result with IBHVG2. Grain geometry from Fikus et al.(2020).
